corpus_scope: goal-versus-implementation comparison across FRE proof surfaces
cross-surface drift detection across the seven lifecycle gates
promotion evidence challenge for comparison-bearing claims

lifecycle_phases.objective: Identify the exact comparison-bearing FRE surfaces and insertion points that must reference InfraNodus.
Scope InfraNodus rows to comparison core, supporting skills, and explicit non-scope without inventing new rows.
Place InfraNodus dependencies coherently across source, schema, examples, expected failures, tests, evaluation, and promotion.
Enforce InfraNodus hook fields only where comparison-bearing artifacts require them.
Make validators and expected-failure fixtures fail when required InfraNodus hooks are missing.
Run the bounded Draft 2020-12 schema, example, pytest, and diff checks without claiming broader substrate truth.
Keep promotion distinct from evaluation and require comparison mapping plus evidence in the promotion records.

mode: Treat this as one continuous autonomous heavy run.
This is a surgical InfraNodus injection run with minimal rewriting.
mission: Add only the smallest required InfraNodus hook points so it is first class across the full seven phase lifecycle.
current_verified_state: Treat these as three distinct, authoritative contracts.
Read the FRE lane as the fresh proof surface.
Use the worktree-to-main consolidation docs as authority.
hard_rules: Use uv only if Python is needed.
Keep schemas valid JSON Schema Draft 2020-12.
No fake green. Fail closed on drift.
Do not collapse evaluation or promotion into tests.
Use gate_id only from the lifecycle gates schema for governance joins.
Use proof package parts inventory only from the proof package schema for evidence completeness.
Re-read touched surfaces after each patch pass and compare cross-surface truth.
allowed_paths: Patch only the InfraNodus hook points and required enforcement surfaces inside the FRE lane.
disallowed_paths: Do not merge the three authoritative contracts.
tasks: Harvest the exact comparison-bearing surfaces and insertion points.
Record the scoped InfraNodus selection durably under meta/harness/fre.
Wire manifest placement across the seven proof-package parts.
Patch schema, tests, and prompt trace enforcement only where required.
Keep promotion as a distinct artifact layer with comparison mapping and evidence.
validation_loop: Run schema validation, example validation, pytest, and git diff checks.
Iterate until the bounded slice is clean or the remaining blocker is proven real.
comparison: Require InfraNodus comparison artifacts for verification, health, and promotion-bearing claims.
success_criteria: Comparison-bearing artifacts carry explicit InfraNodus hooks.
Scoped InfraNodus dependencies are declared across all seven proof-package parts.
Promotion remains explicit and evidence-backed rather than implied by evaluation.
report_contract: Schema validation, example validation, pytest, and git diff results.
Remaining blockers with exact evidence pointers.
Commit hash only if the bounded slice validates cleanly.
